text_lines.text: AI Knowledge Assistant ek RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) based intelligent document assistant
hoga jo PDFs aur multiple documents ko read karke user ke natural language questions ka accurate answer
Yeh project Intimetec Hackathon assignment ke according design kiya gaya hai jahan focus hai:
Traditional keyword search systems semantic meaning understand nahi karte.
Document: "Employees can work remotely twice a week"
User Query: "What is company work from home policy?"
Traditional search fail ho sakta hai because exact keywords match nahi hue.
Ek intelligent enterprise-grade document assistant build karna jo:
Users multiple documents upload kar sakte hain.
User natural language mein question poochega.
AI relevant information retrieve karke answer generate karega.
Example: "refund" aur "money back" related understand honge.
Answer ke niche source document aur chunk reference show hoga.
Purpose: Extract text from PDFs and documents.
Text chunks converted into vector embeddings.
Retrieved context LLM ko diya jayega.
Purpose: Upload PDFs and process embeddings.
Purpose: Receive user query and generate AI response.
Problem: LLM confident but incorrect answer de sakta hai.
Project successful tab mana jayega agar:
AI Knowledge Assistant ek RAG-powered enterprise document intelligence system hai jo company
documents ko understand karke users ke questions ka accurate, context-aware aur citation-supported
answer provide karta hai using semantic search and LLMs.

full_text:
PRD — AI Knowledge Assistant
Project Overview
AI Knowledge Assistant ek RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) based intelligent document assistant
hoga jo PDFs aur multiple documents ko read karke user ke natural language questions ka accurate answer
dega with source citations.
Yeh project Intimetec Hackathon assignment ke according design kiya gaya hai jahan focus hai:
LLM integration
RAG architecture
Semantic search
Scalable AI system design
Production-level thinking
Problem Statement
Traditional keyword search systems semantic meaning understand nahi karte.
Example:
Document: "Employees can work remotely twice a week"
User Query: "What is company work from home policy?"
Traditional search fail ho sakta hai because exact keywords match nahi hue.
AI Knowledge Assistant:
query ka meaning samjhega
relevant context retrieve karega
accurate AI-generated answer dega
source citation show karega
Project Goal
Ek intelligent enterprise-grade document assistant build karna jo:
multiple documents handle kare
•
•
•
•
•
•
•
•
•
•
1
semantic understanding use kare
conversational question answering support kare
source citations provide kare
scalable architecture follow kare
Core Features
1. PDF & Document Upload
Users multiple documents upload kar sakte hain.
Supported formats:
PDF
TXT
DOCX (optional)
2. AI Question Answering
User natural language mein question poochega.
Example:
What is refund policy?
What are employee leave rules?
What is deployment process?
AI relevant information retrieve karke answer generate karega.
3. Semantic Search
Keyword-based nahi.
Meaning-based search use hoga.
Example: "refund" aur "money back" related understand honge.
4. Source Citations
Answer ke niche source document aur chunk reference show hoga.
•
•
•
•
•
•

•
•
•
2
Example:
HRPolicy.pdf
Page 4
5. Chat Interface
Simple conversational UI.
Features:
Question input
AI response area
Source display
Upload section

Modern UI ecosystem
Easy deployment
Tailwind CSS

Rapid UI building
Clean modern design
Shadcn UI
Reason:
Professional UI components
Minimal setup

Reason:
Best ecosystem for AI/ML
Fast APIs
LangChain integration easy

LLM

Cheap
Fast

OpenAI GPT-4

Lightweight
Fast
Free
Strong semantic embeddings

Framework

Document loaders
Retrieval system
LLM orchestration
System Architecture
Complete Flow
User uploads documents
Backend extracts text
Documents split into chunks
Embeddings generated
Stored inside vector database
User asks question
Semantic retrieval runs
Relevant chunks fetched
LLM receives context
AI generates answer
Sources displayed

Architecture Components
Document Loader
Purpose: Extract text from PDFs and documents.
Libraries:
PyPDFLoader
Unstructured
Chunking System
RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter
Configuration:
Chunk Size: 500–1000
Chunk Overlap: 100–200
Reason:
Better context retention
Improved retrieval accuracy
Embedding Pipeline
Text chunks converted into vector embeddings.
Purpose: Semantic similarity search.
Vector Store
Stores embeddings for fast retrieval.
Database:
ChromaDB
•
•
•
•
•
•
•
6
Retrieval Layer
Top-k relevant chunks retrieve karega.
Recommended:
Similarity Search
Hybrid Search (optional)
Reranking (future improvement)
LLM Response Layer
Retrieved context LLM ko diya jayega.
LLM:
Gemini
Output:
Context-aware answer
Source citations

Biggest Failure Mode
Hallucination
Problem: LLM confident but incorrect answer de sakta hai.
Mitigation Strategy
Source citations mandatory
Retrieval filtering
Top-k optimization
Low temperature responses
Better chunking
Context grounding
MVP Scope (2-Day Build)
Must Build
PDF upload
Text extraction
Chunking
Embeddings
ChromaDB integration
Question answering
Source citations
Simple UI
Optional Features
Build only if time remains:
Authentication
Streaming responses
Multi-user support
Dark mode
Chat history
DOCX support
Hybrid retrieval
